title: Network (Windows)
description: Perintah untuk mengelola jaringan, konektivitas, dan konfigurasi network di Windows.

commands.name: ipconfig
commands.title: ipconfig — Konfigurasi IP
commands.description: Menampilkan dan mengelola konfigurasi IP jaringan. Setara dengan ifconfig/ip addr di Linux.
commands.examples:
# Info IP
ipconfig

# Info lengkap
ipconfig /all

# Flush DNS cache
ipconfig /flushdns

# Renew IP
ipconfig /release
ipconfig /renew

# Lihat DNS cache
ipconfig /displaydns

# PowerShell
Get-NetIPAddress
Get-NetAdapter
Get-DnsClientCache
Clear-DnsClientCache

commands.name: ping-win
commands.title: ping — Test Konektivitas
commands.description: Mengirim paket ICMP untuk menguji konektivitas jaringan.
commands.examples:
# Ping basic
ping google.com

# Ping terus-menerus
ping -t google.com

# Ping 10 kali
ping -n 10 192.168.1.1

# Ping dengan ukuran paket
ping -l 1500 google.com

# Test-Connection (PowerShell)
Test-Connection google.com
Test-Connection -ComputerName google.com -Count 5

commands.name: tracert
commands.title: tracert — Trace Route
commands.description: Melacak jalur routing paket ke tujuan. Setara dengan traceroute di Linux.
commands.examples:
# Trace route
tracert google.com

# Tanpa resolve DNS (lebih cepat)
tracert -d google.com

# Maksimal 15 hop
tracert -h 15 google.com

# PowerShell: Test-NetConnection
Test-NetConnection google.com -TraceRoute

commands.name: netstat-win
commands.title: netstat — Statistik Jaringan
commands.description: Menampilkan koneksi jaringan, port yang terbuka, dan statistik.
commands.examples:
# Semua koneksi
netstat -an

# Koneksi dengan PID
netstat -ano

# Koneksi dengan nama program
netstat -ab

# Cari port tertentu
netstat -ano | findstr :80
netstat -ano | findstr :443

# Statistik
netstat -s

# Routing table
netstat -r

# PowerShell
Get-NetTCPConnection
Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen
Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 80

commands.name: nslookup-win
commands.title: nslookup — DNS Lookup
commands.description: Melakukan query DNS untuk mengetahui IP dari domain atau sebaliknya.
commands.examples:
# Lookup domain
nslookup google.com

# Gunakan DNS server tertentu
nslookup google.com 8.8.8.8

# Query MX record
nslookup -type=MX google.com

# Query NS record
nslookup -type=NS google.com

# PowerShell: Resolve-DnsName
Resolve-DnsName google.com
Resolve-DnsName google.com -Type MX
Resolve-DnsName google.com -Server 8.8.8.8

commands.name: netsh
commands.title: netsh — Network Configuration
commands.description: Tool komprehensif untuk konfigurasi jaringan Windows. Sangat powerful untuk WiFi, firewall, dan IP.
commands.examples:
# List interface
netsh interface show interface

# List WiFi profiles
netsh wlan show profiles

# Lihat password WiFi
netsh wlan show profile name="WiFiName" key=clear

# Set IP statis
netsh interface ip set address "Ethernet" static 192.168.1.100 255.255.255.0 192.168.1.1

# Set DNS
netsh interface ip set dns "Ethernet" static 8.8.8.8

# Set DHCP
netsh interface ip set address "Ethernet" dhcp

# Firewall off
netsh advfirewall set allprofiles state off

# Ekspor konfigurasi
netsh wlan export profile folder=C:\WiFiBackup
commands.warning: Mengubah konfigurasi jaringan bisa memutus koneksi. Pastikan Anda tahu cara mengembalikan konfigurasi sebelumnya.

commands.name: curl-win
commands.title: curl — Transfer Data (Windows 10+)
commands.description: Windows 10 ke atas menyertakan curl bawaan untuk transfer data dari URL.
commands.examples:
# GET request
curl https://api.example.com/data

# Download file
curl -o file.zip https://example.com/file.zip

# POST JSON
curl -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"key\":\"value\"}" https://api.example.com

# Header saja
curl -I https://google.com

# PowerShell: Invoke-WebRequest
Invoke-WebRequest https://google.com
Invoke-RestMethod https://api.example.com/data
(Invoke-WebRequest https://example.com/file.zip).Content | Set-Content file.zip -Encoding Byte
